description_long: This is a large, leafless deciduous tree with a thick, textured trunk and an extensive network of gnarled, twisting branches. The branches radiate outward and upward in a complex, interwoven pattern, creating a dramatic silhouette. The bark appears dark and rugged, with deep grooves and a weathered appearance. The tree's canopy is open and sparse, allowing significant visibility through the branches. No leaves or visible roots are present, giving the tree a stark, wintery look. The overall form suggests an old, mature tree that could be found in an urban park or lining a city street.
description: A large, leafless deciduous tree with a thick trunk and a dense web of twisting, dark branches. The canopy is open and sparse, revealing the intricate branch structure.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from above, highlighting the radial spread and complexity of the upper branches.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the leftward extension of the lower branches and the dense central trunk.
description_view_2: The right side of the tree is prominent, showing the thick, intertwining branches and the open canopy.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the tree, displaying the full width of the trunk and the symmetrical spread of the main branches.
